telegramText: MORNING BRIEF — Mar 3, 2026 MACRO REGIME 🟡 Regime: Neutral · Neutral Cycle: STAGFLATION Risk Gauge: ████████████░░░░░░░░ 62.4/100 Growth: ↓ | Inflation: ↑ PRICES • BTC: $67,673 • ETH: $1,965 • SOL: $84.87 • GOLD: $5,070 SPY: $670.63 (-2.2%) QQQ: $592.68 (-2.4%) VIX: 26.9 (+25.7%) TLT: $89.37 (-1.6%) DXY: 99.4 (+1.0%) OIL: $77.03 (+8.1%) USDT Dom: 7.93% — Normal NOTABLE Z-SCORES 🔴 HY Credit Spread: +2.52σ 🔴 IG Credit Spread: +2.41σ 🟢 30Y Mortgage Rate: -2.07σ 🟢 2Y Treasury: -1.76σ 🟢 10Y Real Rate: -1.66σ INTEL DIGEST Crypto markets are surging on institutional inflows and ETF momentum while oil prices spike amid geopolitical tensions, creating a mixed risk‑on for crypto and risk‑off for equities. 🟢 Crypto Rally [BTC, ETH, SOL] Bitcoin rallied to $70k, triggering massive short liquidations, while ETH and SOL also posted double‑digit gains; instit 🔴 Oil Surge [OIL] Oil prices jumped 12% to over $75 a barrel after US‑Israeli airstrikes and Iran’s threat to close the Strait of Hormuz, 🔴 Geopolitical Tension [OIL, SPY] Iran’s attack and the potential for a prolonged Middle East conflict have heightened risk sentiment, pressuring equities 🟢 Institutional Crypto Inflows [BTC, ETH] BTC ETFs and Circle stock gains reflect institutional appetite; on‑chain transfers show large wallet activity supporting 🟢 BTC: BUY — Institutional ETF inflows and short liquidation wave support a bullish stance. 🟡 OIL: HEDGE — Geopolitical risk and price spike warrant protective exposure. 🔄 Contrarian Sell BTC anticipating a correction due to ETF saturation and short‑term volatility. Buy SPY expecting an equity rally if the Fed eases policy amid inflation concerns. NEWS FLAGS ⚠️ AMKR [watch]: FormFactor, Amkor, Kulicke and Soffa, and Entegris Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know ⚠️ KLIC [watch]: FormFactor, Amkor, Kulicke and Soffa, and Entegris Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know ⚠️ BTC-USD [watch]: Sell BTC anticipating a correction due to ETF saturation and short‑term volatility. ⚠️ SPY: Buy SPY expecting an equity rally if the Fed eases policy amid inflation concerns. HEGEMONY SNAPBACK 👀: 1.5/6 — WATCH If the US topples adversarial regimes and reasserts hegemony, the multipolar mega-trade reverses — stronger dollar, weaker gold, short rates, and EM rotation unwinds 🔴 USD Index: 117.8223 (>110) 🟡 2Y Yield: 3.38% (<3.6%) agentcanary.ai | Not financial advice
